title: Jaytv25's Nether Reactor Core
description: This mod adds the Nether Reactor Core back into Minecraft and also adds a new enchantment book to enchant your weapons with. The Nether Spire from the Reactor Core has been replaced with the a new structure.
body:
The Nether Reactor Core remake adds back and overhauls the Nether Reactor Core with a new structure that includes stuff from the more modern day nether. The structure created by the Nether Reactor Is 14 blocks wide and high and includes a patch of soul sand, some lava + magma with rib cages emerging from the ground, and a tiny Nether Fortress with some Blaze spawners. There are also some Wither Skeleton spawners with the first ones being in between the lava and the soul sand and the last one being ontop of the ruined portal which is nearby the other spawners. After 10 seconds (200 ticks) of being activated, the Nether Reactor Core will die out and become unusable.

(Expect this mod to be updated soon)
